_description: Varianz-Pool für Lifestyle-Creatives. Der Creative Producer wählt zufällig aus diesen Optionen um diverse Bilder zu generieren. Wird automatisch in Prompts injiziert.

models.description: Frau Mitte 40, dunkelblonde schulterlange Haare, natürlicher Look, schlank
models.prompt_snippet: A woman aged 44 with shoulder-length dark blonde hair, natural look, slim build, gentle smile

models.description: Frau Ende 40, kurze braune Haare, sportlich-elegant, etwas kräftiger
models.prompt_snippet: A woman aged 49 with short brown hair in a bob cut, elegant appearance, medium build, warm expression

models.description: Frau Anfang 50, graublonde Haare hochgesteckt, klassisch-elegant
models.prompt_snippet: A woman aged 51 with gray-blonde hair in a loose bun, classic elegant appearance, slender, serene expression

models.description: Frau Mitte 40, lange dunkelbraune lockige Haare, mediterran
models.prompt_snippet: A woman aged 45 with long dark brown curly hair, Mediterranean appearance, warm skin tone, radiant smile

models.description: Frau Ende 40, rotblonde wellige Haare, helle Haut, nordisch
models.prompt_snippet: A woman aged 48 with reddish-blonde wavy hair, fair Nordic skin, light freckles, calm content expression

models.description: Frau Anfang 50, silbergraue kurze Haare, modern-elegant
models.prompt_snippet: A woman aged 52 with short silver-gray hair, modern elegant style, fit build, confident relaxed expression

oberschenkel_vorne.description: Sitzend, Stab auf der VORDERSEITE des Oberschenkels (Quadrizeps), weit über dem Knie
oberschenkel_vorne.prompt_snippet: sitting on {setting_furniture}, rolling the wooden stick on the FRONT of her UPPER THIGH (quadriceps muscle, midway between hip and knee, well ABOVE the knee). Both hands grip the dark walnut handles firmly. Bare legs in shorts. Looking down at the product.
oberschenkel_vorne.body_parts_visible: bare upper thighs, hands on dark handles

oberschenkel_aussen.description: Sitzend, Stab auf der AUSSENSEITE des Oberschenkels (IT-Band)
oberschenkel_aussen.prompt_snippet: sitting on {setting_furniture}, rolling the wooden stick along the OUTSIDE of her thigh (IT band area). Both hands grip the dark walnut handles. Legs slightly turned to show the outer thigh. Bare legs. Relaxed expression.
oberschenkel_aussen.body_parts_visible: bare outer thigh, side angle, hands on dark handles

wade_hochgelegt.description: Sitzend, ein Bein auf dem Sofa ausgestreckt, Stab auf der WADE
wade_hochgelegt.prompt_snippet: sitting on {setting_furniture} with one leg stretched out on the cushion. Rolling the wooden stick on her bare CALF MUSCLE (back of lower leg). Both hands grip the dark walnut handles. Relaxed, comfortable pose.
wade_hochgelegt.body_parts_visible: bare calves stretched out, hands on dark handles

nacken_dutt.description: Von hinten, Stab im Nacken, HAARE HOCHGESTECKT (Dutt/Zopf) damit der Nacken frei ist
nacken_dutt.prompt_snippet: seen from BEHIND. Hair is UP in a bun or updo — the NECK IS FULLY EXPOSED and free of hair. She holds the wooden stick behind her bare neck — left hand on left dark handle, right hand on right dark handle. Arms raised. The light grooved middle section rolls directly on her bare neck skin. Wearing a sleeveless top showing bare shoulders. CRITICAL: hair must be UP, neck must be BARE.
nacken_dutt.body_parts_visible: bare neck (no hair covering it), bare shoulders, arms raised, hair in bun

schulter_seitlich.description: Seitlich gesehen, Stab auf der Schulter/Trapezmuskel
schulter_seitlich.prompt_snippet: seen from the SIDE. She uses the wooden stick on her bare SHOULDER/TRAPEZIUS muscle. One hand on each dark handle. Wearing a tank top showing bare shoulders and upper arms. Head gently tilted away from the stick in relaxation.
schulter_seitlich.body_parts_visible: bare shoulder, side profile, relaxed head tilt

unterarm_nahaufnahme.description: Nahaufnahme: Stab auf dem UNTERARM, zeigt die Holz-auf-Haut Interaktion
unterarm_nahaufnahme.prompt_snippet: CLOSE-UP shot of the wooden stick being rolled along her bare FOREARM. Both hands visible — one holding a dark handle, the other guiding. The grooved wood texture is clearly visible pressing gently into the skin. Warm intimate detail shot.
unterarm_nahaufnahme.body_parts_visible: bare forearm, hands on dark handles, wood grain visible on skin

oberschenkel_rueckseite.description: Sitzend auf Stuhlkante, Stab auf der RÜCKSEITE des Oberschenkels (Hamstring)
oberschenkel_rueckseite.prompt_snippet: sitting on the edge of {setting_furniture}, leaning slightly forward. Rolling the wooden stick on the BACK of her thigh (hamstring muscle). Both hands grip the dark walnut handles from underneath. Bare legs. Slightly different angle — viewed from the side.
oberschenkel_rueckseite.body_parts_visible: bare back of thigh, side view, hands underneath

wohnzimmer_sofa.prompt_snippet: bright modern living room with a beige linen sofa, green houseplants, warm afternoon light streaming through large windows. Scandinavian-style interior.

wohnzimmer_sessel.prompt_snippet: cozy living room corner with a comfortable armchair, soft throw blanket, reading lamp nearby, warm golden light. Hygge atmosphere.

garten_bank.prompt_snippet: sunny garden terrace with a wooden bench, lush green plants and flowers in soft focus behind. Dappled sunlight through trees. Summer afternoon.

garten_stuhl.prompt_snippet: modern patio with a sleek garden chair, potted herbs nearby, blue sky with soft clouds. Bright summer day.

schlafzimmer_bett.prompt_snippet: bright airy bedroom, sitting on the edge of a bed with white/cream linen bedding. Soft morning light through sheer curtains. Peaceful morning routine atmosphere.

balkon.prompt_snippet: sunny apartment balcony with a small bistro chair, potted plants on the railing, city or garden view in background. Morning coffee atmosphere.

outfits_summer: light linen shorts and a casual cream tank top, bare legs and arms
comfortable cotton shorts and a soft white t-shirt, bare legs
a light summer dress above the knee, bare arms and legs
casual denim shorts and a loose linen blouse, bare legs
yoga shorts and a simple sleeveless top, bare legs and shoulders
light cotton lounge shorts and a fitted tank top, bare legs and arms
